hero.title: Vagabond
hero.subtitle: The app that turns your travels into adventures

whatIsVagabond.title: What is Vagabond?
whatIsVagabond.description1: Vagabond is the real-world scratch map.
whatIsVagabond.description2: An app that transforms your daily life, travels, and weekends into challenges to complete.
whatIsVagabond.description3: Whether you're in France or on the other side of the world, discover everything there is to do and see around you: must-see places, hidden spots, local specialties, unusual experiences... And check them off as you go on your adventures.
whatIsVagabond.goal: The goal? Complete your own scratch map of the world, explore at your own pace, and miss nothing.

appForTravelers.title: An app designed for travelers
appForTravelers.feature1: Challenges to complete, fun facts to discover, useful information for each location
appForTravelers.feature2: A community of travelers to share your favorites and discover new ones
appForTravelers.feature3: A real sense of accomplishment with each location checked off
appForTravelers.feature4: A fun, engaging, and motivating app that makes you want to go on an adventure... even near home
appForTravelers.footer: Vagabond is the app for backpackers, urban explorers, discovery enthusiasts, and freedom lovers.

comingSoon.emailPrompt: Give us your email to test Vagabond in advance for your trip!
comingSoon.successMessage: Your email has been successfully registered!
comingSoon.errorMessage: An error occurred while registering your email. Please try again.
